title: Amtech H2100 12 Piece carpenter's pencil set
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: SOFT LEAD FOR CLEAR MARKING: These 175mm (7") oval section carpenter's pencils have soft leads to make clear marks on wood and other common building materials
DURABLE BUILD: Made to withstand regular use in demanding environments
SIZE CAPACITY: 7 inch / 175 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: From the manufacturer H2100 Carpenter Pencil (12-Piece) Oval section carpenters pencils with soft lead to leave a good mark on wood and other common building materials Overall length: approx 7″ (175mm) Ideal for marking/layout use About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
